title: geranium viscosissimum f. album
intro: Geranium viscosissimum f. album, also known as the sticky geranium, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of North America. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate circulation, reduce inflammation, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Geranium viscosissimum f. album include its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps, reduce anxiety and stress, and support the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety.
